name: close_workstream
description: Soft-close a child workstream — preserves the conversation in the database but removes it from the active pool so it no longer consumes a slot. Use when a sub-task is done. Opposite of delete_workstream (which is hard).

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for closing. Persisted on the workstream's config row and surfaced as `close_reason` on subsequent inspect_workstream calls so post-mortems don't have to scrape the audit log.
